links.text: The Faroe Islands SEV, the main power supplier on the Faroe Islands, are working towards 100% renewable energy by 2030. Visit Faroe Islands
Minesto Minesto enables renewable electricity from the ocean, and can be installed in areas where no other known technology can operate cost effectively. Visit Minesto
SKF At SKF we're focused on making the most of the resources we already have. By fighting friction, we're contributing to a world where we can all do more with less. About SKF
